docs.title: Employee PIN
docs.text:
Clover requires 4-digit PINs. The old POS used 3-digit PINs.

Your existing PIN still works

Add a leading zero to make it 4 digits.

Example: 253 becomes 0253.

docs.title: Lock the device or switch accounts
docs.text: Tap the lock button (bottom right) → enter the next PIN.

docs.title: Clock In
docs.text:
1. Open the Shifts app from the home screen
  2. Tap Clock in (bottom right)
  3. Check the box if holding cash sales this shift
  4. Tap Clock In

docs.title: Clock Out
docs.text:
1. Open the Shifts app from the home screen
  2. Tap Clock out (bottom right)
  3. Tap Clock Out

docs.title: Server Shift Report
docs.text:
The shift report shows whether the house owes the server tip settlements, or whether the server owes the house cash back. Print it after every shift and include it in the cash bag.

  1. Open the Shifts app from the home screen
  2. Tap the row for the shift just clocked out of
  3. Verify the Holding cash sales box is correct — fix it if wrong
  4. Tap Print report
  5. Include the printout in the cash bag

docs.title: Tip Out Calculator
docs.text:
The Tip Out Calculator provides a suggested tip-out breakdown to kitchen and bar staff at the end of a shift.

Clock out first

Clock out of the shift via the Shifts app before opening the Tip Out Calculator.

  1. Tap the Tip Out Calculator from the home screen
  2. The app loads the latest shift and displays the suggested tip-out breakdown
